name: [Nikke] | Rapi
description:
`April fools (3/3)`
___

`And so, that concludes the april fools releases for me at the very least. I hope you guys enjoyed interacting with the bots as much as I liked writing them. My hands and brain hurt from all this typing in one day, but as long as I can bring a smile to someone’s face, then I know I've done something right.`
  *– ShrewdPioneer at 11:45 PM (ET)*

*on a side note, i'm actually* **LIVID** *about the fact my bots arent going public as fast as they should be. at the time of posting this bot, the rapi & anis bot STILL hasnt gone public, despite me publishing it like* **4 hours ago**
___

**DISCLAIMER: All of the example dialogue can be found in her bond story/events. Do not click unless you want her bond story spoiled. And as always, her example dialogue is all strictly from the game; I do not claim it as my own.**
